heading: Counterclaim for an order other than a sum of money
infoParagraph1: You will be able to upload any evidence the defendant has on the next page.
infoParagraph2: The claimant will be able to see your answers.
characterCountHint: For example, 'for the landlord to conduct remedial works'
otherOrderRequestFactsLabel: What facts would they like the court to consider when deciding the claim?
otherOrderRequestDetailsLabel: What orders are they asking for the court to make?

errors.otherOrderRequestDetailsRequired: Enter what orders they are asking the court to make
errors.otherOrderRequestDetailsMaxLength: What orders they are asking the court to make must be 6800 characters or less
errors.otherOrderRequestFactsRequired: Enter what facts they would like the court to consider when deciding the claim
errors.otherOrderRequestFactsMaxLength: What facts they would like the court to consider must be 6800 characters or less
